codeReview.summary: The feature implementation satisfies the core requirements: .gitignore was created with the requested exclusions, artboard-map.json is valid JSON with 76 entries and required fields, and output paths align with the init.sh-created skeleton. One minor metadata mismatch was found in the divider name versus AGENTS.md.

issues.description: The divider name is "— Igloo Web App Screens —", while AGENTS.md lists "— Igloo Web App Screens — (divider, skip extraction)" for ID 347-0. This is a small source-of-truth mismatch in the AGENTS-derived mapping.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The extractor skill procedure requires verifying MCP access via Paper___get_node_info on the first artboard, but this feature used Paper___get_basic_info and still recorded followedProcedure=true. The skill likely needs a branch for setup/mapping features that do not follow per-artboard extraction flow.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/extractor/SKILL.md:29-31 requires get_node_info; handoff for repo-setup records get_basic_info and followedProcedure=true (handoffs/2026-04-17T23-02-48-383Z__repo-setup__f057faba-b466-4b7b-8824-1f5cf05fcae8.json:43-45,54).

sharedStateObservations.observation: The AGENTS artboard list embeds divider handling guidance directly in the display name line, which creates ambiguity about whether parenthetical text is part of the canonical name.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md:113 lists "347-0: — Igloo Web App Screens — (divider, skip extraction)" while artboard-map.json uses "— Igloo Web App Screens —" at line 197.

summary: Review completed for feature repo-setup (commit ac85c48). Core deliverables are present and aligned with requirements; status is pass with one non-blocking metadata mismatch and two shared-state observations.
